test_cases.description: Verify should return true for valid proof and claim.
test_cases.setup_description: Set up with valid proof and claim.

test_cases.description: Verify should return InvalidProof error for corrupted proof data.
Request capability should return a token for valid capability spec.
Request capability should return CapabilityRequestFailed when network issues occur.
test_cases.input_description: Valid spec with hypothetical network issues.

test_cases.description: Check authority should return true when identity has authority.
test_cases.expected_output_description: Returns true since authority is present.

test_cases.description: Check authority should return false when identity does not have authority.
test_cases.expected_output_description: Returns false since authority is missing.

test_cases.description: Parse credential should return a claim for a valid token.
Parse credential should return CredentialParseError for a malformed token.
All functions should return consistent results given the same inputs.
test_cases.setup_description: Set up inputs for repeated calls.
test_cases.input_description: Repeatedly call each function with the same inputs.
test_cases.expected_output_description: Consistent results for the same inputs.

generated_code:
import pytest
from unittest.mock import Mock
from src.signet_sdk import *


@pytest.fixture
def mock_verify(mocker):
    mock = mocker.patch('src.signet_sdk.verify')
    return mock


@pytest.fixture
def mock_requestCapability(mocker):
    mock = mocker.patch('src.signet_sdk.requestCapability')
    return mock


@pytest.fixture
def mock_checkAuthority(mocker):
    mock = mocker.patch('src.signet_sdk.checkAuthority')
    return mock


@pytest.fixture
def mock_parseCredential(mocker):
    mock = mocker.patch('src.signet_sdk.parseCredential')
    return mock


def test_verify_happy_path(mock_verify):
    mock_verify.return_value = Ok(True)
    proof = Proof(data=b'validproof')
    claim = Claim(attribute='age', value=25)
    result = verify(proof, claim)
    assert result.is_ok(), "Expected verification to succeed"
    assert result.unwrap() is True, "Expected result to be True"


def test_verify_invalid_proof(mock_verify):
    mock_verify.return_value = Err(SignetError.InvalidProof)
    proof = Proof(data=b'')
    claim = Claim(attribute='age', value=25)
    result = verify(proof, claim)
    assert result.is_err(), "Expected verification to fail"
    assert result.unwrap_err() == SignetError.InvalidProof, "Expected InvalidProof error"


def test_request_capability_happy_path(mock_requestCapability):
    mock_requestCapability.return_value = Ok('valid_token')
    spec = CapabilitySpec(permissions=['read', 'write'], expiration=60)
    result = requestCapability(spec)
    assert result.is_ok(), "Expected capability request to succeed"
    assert isinstance(result.unwrap(), str), "Expected result to be a string token"


def test_request_capability_network_failure(mock_requestCapability):
    mock_requestCapability.return_value = Err(SignetError.CapabilityRequestFailed)
    spec = CapabilitySpec(permissions=['read'], expiration=60)
    result = requestCapability(spec)
    assert result.is_err(), "Expected capability request to fail"
    assert result.unwrap_err() == SignetError.CapabilityRequestFailed, "Expected CapabilityRequestFailed error"


def test_check_authority_happy_path(mock_checkAuthority):
    mock_checkAuthority.return_value = Ok(True)
    signet_id = SignetId(id='valid')
    authority = 'admin'
    result = checkAuthority(signet_id, authority)
    assert result.is_ok(), "Expected authority check to succeed"
    assert result.unwrap() is True, "Expected result to be True"


def test_check_authority_missing(mock_checkAuthority):
    mock_checkAuthority.return_value = Ok(False)
    signet_id = SignetId(id='valid')
    authority = 'guest'
    result = checkAuthority(signet_id, authority)
    assert result.is_ok(), "Expected authority check to succeed"
    assert result.unwrap() is False, "Expected result to be False"


def test_parse_credential_happy_path(mock_parseCredential):
    mock_parseCredential.return_value = Ok(Claim(attribute='age', value=25))
    token = 'validtoken'
    result = parseCredential(token)
    assert result.is_ok(), "Expected credential parsing to succeed"
    assert isinstance(result.unwrap(), Claim), "Expected result to be a Claim instance"


def test_parse_credential_invalid_token(mock_parseCredential):
    mock_parseCredential.return_value = Err(SignetError.CredentialParseError)
    token = 'invalidtoken'
    result = parseCredential(token)
    assert result.is_err(), "Expected credential parsing to fail"
    assert result.unwrap_err() == SignetError.CredentialParseError, "Expected CredentialParseError"


def test_invariant_same_input_consistent_results(mock_verify, mock_requestCapability, mock_checkAuthority, mock_parseCredential):
    mock_verify.return_value = Ok(True)
    mock_requestCapability.return_value = Ok('valid_token')
    mock_checkAuthority.return_value = Ok(True)
    mock_parseCredential.return_value = Ok(Claim(attribute='age', value=25))

    proof = Proof(data=b'sameproof')
    claim = Claim(attribute='age', value=25)
    spec = CapabilitySpec(permissions=['read'], expiration=60)
    signet_id = SignetId(id='consistent')
    authority = 'read'
    token = 'consistenttoken'

    result1 = verify(proof, claim)
    result2 = verify(proof, claim)
    assert result1 == result2, "Expected consistent verification results"

    result3 = requestCapability(spec)
    result4 = requestCapability(spec)
    assert result3 == result4, "Expected consistent capability request results"

    result5 = checkAuthority(signet_id, authority)
    result6 = checkAuthority(signet_id, authority)
    assert result5 == result6, "Expected consistent authority check results"

    result7 = parseCredential(token)
    result8 = parseCredential(token)
    assert result7 == result8, "Expected consistent credential parsing results"
